testcase.name: toString contains the color value
getColor returns the color set at construction
toString is not null or empty
Side survives multiple consecutive setSide calls
getSide returns the current side
toString contains the side value
setSide to a fractional value is stored correctly
Single-arg constructor defaults color to black via Rectangle
setSide to zero is accepted by the setter
setSide to a very large value is stored correctly
Single-arg constructor passes side as width to Rectangle
Two-arg constructor sets color correctly
Two-arg constructor passes side as width to Rectangle
Single-arg constructor passes side as height to Rectangle
Single-arg constructor sets side correctly
Square is a subclass of Rectangle
Square is a subclass of Shape
setSide updates the side
Two-arg constructor passes side as height to Rectangle
Two-arg constructor sets side correctly
